title: Dark knife
description: this mod adds the black knife from deltarune
body:
this mod adds the black knife from deltarune

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/613308b7b7fff241d0bf0aa5626d5f6c4280c33d_0.webp)

uses:

right click gives you strenght 6

left click kills any mob that you hit

crafting:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b5dd68306ea21f2c154ad06ea281e7ab699bf9a.png)

2 netherite blocks 1 nether star 1 netherite ingot and 1 dark oak log
